title: Quikr is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Quikr is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Full Stack Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
